Name: Play Area Effect
Description: Covers parameters relating to play area effects.

Fields.Name: Far Texture: Tiling
Fields.Description: Controls UV tiling for the far-distance texture layer, affecting how frequently the texture repeats.

Fields.Name: Far Texture: Emissive Scale
Fields.Description: Scales emissive intensity of the far texture layer.

Fields.Name: Enable Play Area Effect
Fields.Description: Enables or disables the play area visual effect system.

Fields.Name: Base Color Override
Fields.Description: Overrides the base color of the play area material.

Fields.Name: Smoothness Override
Fields.Description: Overrides the surface smoothness/roughness of the play area material.

Fields.Name: Base Color Rate
Fields.Description: Blending factor for the base color override.

Fields.Name: Smoothness Rate
Fields.Description: Blending factor for the smoothness override.

Fields.Name: Emissive Rate
Fields.Description: Controls overall contribution of emissive lighting in the play area effect.

Fields.Name: Near Floor Texture: Tiling
Fields.Description: Controls UV tiling for the near floor texture layer.

Fields.Name: Near Floor Texture: Speed
Fields.Description: Controls scrolling speed of the near floor texture.

Fields.Name: Near Wall Texture: Tiling
Fields.Description: Controls UV tiling for the near wall texture layer.

Fields.Name: Near Wall Texture: Speed
Fields.Description: Controls scrolling speed of the near wall texture.

Fields.Name: Far Texture: Speed
Fields.Description: Controls scrolling speed of the far-distance texture layer.

Fields.Name: Mask Texture: Tiling | Speed
Fields.Description: Controls UV tiling and scrolling speed for the primary mask texture used to blend effects.

Fields.Name: Detail Mask Texture: Tiling
Fields.Description: Controls tiling of the detail mask texture for fine-grained blending.

Fields.ID: PlayAreaEffect Detail Mask Offset for Wall
Fields.Name: Detail Mask Texture: Offset for Wall
Fields.Description: Offsets the detail mask mapping on wall surfaces.

Fields.Name: Distance Texture: Tiling | Speed
Fields.Description: Controls tiling and scrolling speed of the distance-based texture layer.

Fields.Name: Emissive Scale
Fields.Description: Global multiplier for emissive intensity across the play area effect.

Fields.ID: PlayAreaEffect Emissive Scale Detail Near Floor
Fields.Name: Near Floor Texture: Emissive Scale
Fields.Description: Emissive intensity for the near floor texture layer.

Fields.ID: PlayAreaEffect Emissive Scale Detail Near Wall
Fields.Name: Near Wall Texture: Emissive Scale
Fields.Description: Emissive intensity for the near wall texture layer.

Fields.ID: PlayAreaEffect Emissive Scale Detail Near Marble
Fields.Name: Near Marble Texture: Emissive Scale
Fields.Description: Emissive intensity for the near marble texture layer.

Fields.ID: PlayAreaEffect Emissive Scale Detail Far Marble
Fields.Name: Far Marble Texture: Emissive Scale
Fields.Description: Emissive intensity for the far marble texture layer.

Fields.Name: Border Size
Fields.Description: Controls the thickness of the visual border around the play area.

Fields.Name: Border Color Scale
Fields.Description: Scales the intensity or brightness of the border color.

Fields.Name: Wave Scale
Fields.Description: Controls the amplitude of wave-like distortion effects.

Fields.Name: Wave Frequency
Fields.Description: Controls the frequency of wave distortion patterns.

Fields.Name: Rain Drop Tiling
Fields.Description: Controls how frequently raindrop effects repeat across the surface.

Fields.Name: Rain Drop Speed
Fields.Description: Controls animation speed of raindrop effects.

Fields.Name: Final Mask Offset
Fields.Description: Applies a final offset to mask sampling for fine-tuning effect alignment.

Fields.Name: Distance Fade Start
Fields.Description: Distance at which the play area effect begins to fade out.

Fields.Name: Distance Fade Range
Fields.Description: Distance over which the play area effect fully fades out.

Fields.Name: Distortion Scale
Fields.Description: Controls the strength of distortion effects applied to the play area visuals.
